title: Server restart
body:
**🔁 Server Restart Plugin**

A simple and reliable plugin that lets you restart your Minecraft server with an automatic countdown in chat.
Perfect for server admins who want quick, organized restarts without any extra setup.


---

**⚙️ Features**

Starts a 60-second countdown before restarting

Sends automatic messages at 60s, 40s, and 20s

Only players with the svstart.admin permission can use the command

Works perfectly with Spigot, Paper, and similar servers

Lightweight and easy to use — no unnecessary extras



---

**💬 Command**

/svrestart

Starts the restart timer and announces the countdown in chat.


---

**🧰 Permission**

svstart.admin

Required to run the restart command.


---

**📦 How to Install**

1. Download the plugin


2. Drop the .jar file into your /plugins/ folder


3. Restart your server


4. Done — you’re ready to go! ✅




---

**🚀 Upcoming Features**

Customizable countdown duration

Editable messages via config

Automatic restart after the countdown ends



---

**👤 Developer**

Created by DuckyRuby55 🦆 

A small, clean, and functional admin tool built with care for the Minecraft community.
